Header.Name: cst-triLand - Synchronous - Onchange Real Property Status
Header.Description: When Real Property Status Indicator is selected update GUI fields for Federal. Updated to reflect new ICE values in RP Status classification.

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 11
Task.Description: ID = 11 is for the new value, "C", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Set Disposition Section to Visible from triLand
Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 10
Task.Description: ID = 10 is for the new value, "B", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 12
Task.Description: ID = 12 is for the new value, "F", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 13
Task.Description: ID = 13 is for the new value, "G", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Set Report of Excess Submitted to Visible and Disposition section to not visible from triLand

Task.Description: For when the FedStatusCL value is changed some of the new ICE fields may be hidden. Any value they may contain must also be cleared out.

Task.TaskLabel: Set Report of Excess Accepted to visible and Disposition section to not visible from triLand
Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 'I'
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 'D'
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 'A'
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 'E'
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Set Disposition Section to Visible from triLand
Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 7
Task.Description: ID = 7 is for the new value, "A", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Set Disposition section to not visible from triLand
Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Set Determination to Dispose and Disposition section to visible
Get Real Property Status Classification ID = 8
Task.Description: ID = 8 is for the new value, "I", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Set Disposition Section to not visible from triLand
Get Real Propety Status Classification ID = 9
Task.Description: ID = 9 is for the new value, "D", that has been added to the classification
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Get Real Property Status Classification ID
Task.FilterBo: triFedStatus - Workflow - Get Real Property Status Classification
